description: A ground-level photograph shows an extensive wetland landscape under a partly cloudy blue sky. The foreground and midground feature shallow, dark water intermingled with dense, light brown, reedy marsh vegetation growing in distinct patches. In the background, a low, tree-covered hill is visible, with a small settlement of buildings appearing along the water's edge to the right of the hill. The scene illustrates a typical salt marsh or inland marsh environment, characterised by vegetated low-lying areas susceptible to flooding.
